title: Orthotics and Prosthetics Mission and Vision
content:
Orthotics and Prosthetics Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a reputable and innovator department in field of Orthotic-Prosthetic which does qualified work and teaching focused on research and practise.

Mission

To graduate Orthotic-Prosthetic professionals who is capable of raising patient’s life standards and aware of scientific innovations, makes inventive designs, provides prosthesis producement and maintenance.
